alertAddressBody: New cards usually arrive in your mailbox within 7–10 business days. Check back here in 1–2 business days to see your updated card details.

sectionCardsBody: Here are your children's DC SUN Bucks cards we have on file.
sectionCardsAlertBody: If your child is eligible for SUN Bucks through SNAP or TANF participation, they will not have a DC Sun Bucks card. Their benefits will be loaded onto the SNAP or TANF EBT card.
cardTableTypes: [DC SUN Bucks/Household SNAP EBT/Household TANF EBT] Card
alertEbtEdgeTitle: Check balance or change PIN number
alertEbtEdgeFeatures:
Check the card balance and transactions, 
Freeze or unfreeze to protect benefits from theft, 
or change the card PIN
alertEbtEdgeBody2: You can call Fidelity Information Services (FIS) at (888) 328-2656 or use ebtEDGE online and create an account.
alertEbtEdgeAction2: Tap to call Fidelity Information Services (FIS)
sectionEnrolledChildrenBody1: The following children are enrolled in DC SUN Bucks. If you would like to submit an application for a child who isn't enrolled, you may
sectionEnrolledChildrenBody2: If you would like to submit an application for a child who isn't enrolled, you may
sectionEnrolledChildrenAction: submit a DC SUN Bucks application.
sectionApplicationsBody: Here are your DC SUN Bucks applications for children who haven't been automatically enrolled.
alertApplicationsTitle: Currently, you have no children enrolled in DC SUN Bucks or DC SUN Bucks applications
alertApplicationsBody: Come back to this dashboard in 1–2 business days if you've just applied, and your application isn't displayed.
alertApplicationsAction: Apply for DC SUN Bucks now
title: Activate a card
body:
Once you receive your child's card, call EBT Customer Service at (888) 328-2656. Follow the instructions to set the PIN number to activate the card.

When asked to "enter your date of birth" by the recording, do not enter your own birthday. Enter the child's birthdate in the format MONTH-DAY-YEAR.

When asked to "enter the primary cardholder's" ZIP Code, enter the ZIP Code of the address it was mailed to.
action: Tap to call EBT Customer Service
